events.title: Mastercard reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Mastercard reached its best available historical closing price of USD 598.96.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Mastercard added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Mastercard is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Financial companies are judged by confidence, regulation, credit quality, interest rates and the durability of returns through cycles.
